summary: Phase 3.7j Testing Complete - All backend tests pass (14/14). Frontend features verified: ApplicantLayout rewritten to top header, ApplyPage has password fields + privacy checkbox, StaffDashboard has CSV export + Wiedervorlage panel, Messaging supports file upload/download, Followups CRUD working.
critical_code_review_comments: Leads ingest with password: Creates account, sets auth cookies, returns account_created: true ✓
Leads ingest without password: Backwards compatible, no account_created flag ✓
Followups API: GET /api/followups, GET /api/followups/due, POST, PUT, DELETE all working ✓
Export API: GET /api/export/applications returns CSV with proper headers ✓
Export API: Stage filter ?stage=lead_new works correctly ✓
Messaging attachments: storage_key not exposed to frontend (security) ✓
ApplicantLayout: Rewritten from sidebar to TOP HEADER navigation ✓
StaffDashboard: Wiedervorlage panel (followups-panel) visible when due followups exist ✓
StaffTasksPage: Task creation form with filter tabs working ✓
ApplicantDetailPage: Followup panel with create button visible ✓
seed_data_creation: Test followups created: TEST_Phase37j: Dokumente nachfragen, TEST_Phase37j: Update test, TEST_Phase37j: Dismiss test. Test message attachments: test_phase37j.pdf, download_test.pdf, staff_test.pdf. Test leads: test_phase37j_*, test_nopass_*, test_portal_access_*
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 3.7j complete. Key changes: 1) ApplicantLayout rewritten from sidebar to top header matching StaffLayout, 2) ApplyPage now has password fields + privacy checkbox for account creation during application, 3) Leads/ingest endpoint accepts password field - creates account and sets auth cookies, 4) New followups router for Wiedervorlage CRUD, 5) New export router for CSV download, 6) Messaging supports file attachments via POST /api/conversations/{id}/attachments. Cookie banner must be dismissed before login. Onboarding tour modal may appear for applicants.
passed_checks: Backend: Health endpoint returns OK
Backend: Staff login returns staff role
Backend: Applicant login returns applicant role
Backend: POST /api/leads/ingest with password creates account and sets cookies
Backend: POST /api/leads/ingest without password works (backwards compatible)
Backend: GET /api/followups returns list
Backend: GET /api/followups/due returns due followups
Backend: POST /api/followups creates followup
Backend: PUT /api/followups/{id} updates followup
Backend: DELETE /api/followups/{id} dismisses followup
Backend: GET /api/export/applications returns CSV
Backend: GET /api/export/applications?stage=lead_new filters by stage
Backend: POST /api/conversations/{id}/attachments uploads file
Backend: GET /api/messages/{id}/attachment downloads file
Backend: Staff can download applicant attachments
Backend: Auth cookies work after ingest (can access /api/auth/me)
Frontend: Apply page has password input field
Frontend: Apply page has password confirm field
Frontend: Apply page has privacy checkbox
Frontend: Staff login redirects to /staff
Frontend: Staff portal has top header navigation
Frontend: Staff dashboard has CSV-Export button
Frontend: Staff dashboard has Wiedervorlage panel
Frontend: /staff/tasks page loads with task creation button
Frontend: /staff/tasks page has filter tabs
Frontend: /staff/messaging page loads with conversation list
Frontend: Staff messaging has file upload button (after selecting conversation)
Frontend: Applicant login redirects to /portal
Frontend: Applicant portal has TOP HEADER navigation (not sidebar)
Frontend: Applicant portal has logo and user menu
Frontend: /portal/messages page loads correctly
Frontend: Applicant messages page has file upload (paperclip) button
Frontend: Applicant detail page has followup panel
Frontend: Applicant detail page has create followup button
notes: Onboarding tour modal may block interactions for applicants on first visit - can be dismissed with Skip or X button. File upload accepts: .pdf, .jpg, .jpeg, .png, .webp, .doc, .docx (text/plain NOT allowed).
